title: Yaddle's Tale: The One Below

[[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]] – [[37 BBY/Legends|37 BBY]],<ref name="YaddleDate">"Yaddle's Tale: The One Below" takes place after [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon's]] ascension to the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], and prior to [[Yaddle/Legends|Yaddle's]] ascension to the Council. Yaddle appears as a member of the Jedi High Council during [[Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell 1|''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell'' 1]], established in its introduction to take place five [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to {{Film|I}}, which is dated by ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], five years after [[37 BBY/Legends|37 BBY]]. Therefore, this story must take place between 44 and 37 BBY.</ref> with flashbacks to over two-hundred [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior

"'''Yaddle's Tale: The One Below'''" is a 16-page comic published in ''[[Star Wars Tales 5]]'', featuring the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yaddle/Legends|Yaddle]]. The comic takes place sometime before the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], telling the story of how and why she was granted the title of Master and her seat on the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]]. It was collected in ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 2]]'' and ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: Rise of the Sith Vol. 1]]''.

==Plot summary==
[[File:Yaddles_Tale.jpg|thumb|left|Yaddle in captivity]]

While discussing the possibility of knighting Yaddle, the Jedi Council revisit the story of her training under the tutelage of [[Polvin Kut]], two hundred years prior.

On a mission to liberate the colonies of the [[Advozse/Legends|Advozse]] warlord [[Tulak]], the duo are betrayed on [[Koba]], leading to Kut's death. The [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] Yaddle is taken hostage by the warlord but is impervious to his interrogations, warning him "Rule by terror you do, die by fear you will."

In time, Tulak tires of the colony and leaves Koba. Before he leaves, he seals Yaddle in a pit with the hope that he can use her as a future bargaining tool; however, she is soon forgotten. She is confined for a century, surviving on food and water provided by wardens left behind when Tulak left. Over the generations, the primitives come to speak of her as ''The One Below''. During this time, Yaddle hones her Jedi skills.

Eventually, a [[Groundquake/Legends|groundquake]] brings down the roof of her pit, allowing her to escape. Seeing the destruction of the nearby village, she remains on the planet to aid the Kobans. Bringing the citizens to prosperity, she is quietly content with her work until the day [[Kalut]], Tulak's son, returns to Koba, claiming it as his heirloom. Forced to fight, Yaddle defeats him, finally finishing her master's mission.

On hearing the story, the Jedi Council, in particular Yoda, wants her to continue her Jedi training, but are swayed to initiate her as a Jedi Master.

==Continuity==
As the comic is part of a ''Star Wars Tales'' issue preceding [[Star Wars Tales 21|Issue #21]], its original level of canon was unclear. However, the contents of the story have now been referenced in the novels ''[[Cloak of Deception]]'' and ''[[Jedi Quest: The Shadow Trap]]'', as well as in ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', so it has largely been canonized.

There are some small issues with the framing story, as [[Oppo Rancisis/Legends|Oppo Rancisis]] is present on the Jedi Council for the confirmation of Yaddle in some of the panels of the comic, but Oppo is elsewhere stated to be trained by Yaddle.<ref name="PotJ">''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]''</ref>
